name: Alert Dialog
description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user's workflow to communicate an important message and acquire a response, such as action confirmation prompts or error acknowledgments.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus to next tabbable element inside the dialog; wraps from last to first
Moves focus to previous tabbable element inside the dialog; wraps from first to last

roles.description: Identifies the element as an alert dialog, enabling assistive technologies to give it special treatment

required_attributes.description: Provides accessible name, preferably referencing visible title
References the element containing the alert message text

notes: Follows same focus trap pattern as dialog-modal
Focus should be set to the least destructive action button on open
When closed, focus returns to the element that invoked the dialog
